title: Phill CLI Settings
description: Configuration file schema for Phill CLI settings. This schema enables IDE completion for `settings.json`.

$schema.title: Schema
$schema.description: The URL of the JSON schema for this settings file. Used by editors for validation and autocompletion.

mcpServers.title: MCP Servers
mcpServers.markdownDescription:
Configuration for MCP servers.

- Category: `Advanced`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `{}`

general.title: General
general.markdownDescription:
General application settings.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `{}`

previewFeatures.title: Preview Features (e.g., models)
previewFeatures.markdownDescription:
Enable preview features (e.g., preview models).

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

preferredEditor.title: Preferred Editor
preferredEditor.description: The preferred editor to open files in.
preferredEditor.markdownDescription:
The preferred editor to open files in.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`

vimMode.title: Vim Mode
vimMode.markdownDescription:
Enable Vim keybindings

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

enableAutoUpdate.title: Enable Auto Update
enableAutoUpdate.markdownDescription:
Enable automatic updates.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

enableAutoUpdateNotification.title: Enable Auto Update Notification
enableAutoUpdateNotification.markdownDescription:
Enable update notification prompts.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

checkpointing.title: Checkpointing
checkpointing.markdownDescription:
Session checkpointing settings.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `{}`

enabled.title: Enable Checkpointing
enabled.markdownDescription:
Enable session checkpointing for recovery

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `false`

enablePromptCompletion.title: Enable Prompt Completion
enablePromptCompletion.description: Enable AI-powered prompt completion suggestions while typing.
enablePromptCompletion.markdownDescription:
Enable AI-powered prompt completion suggestions while typing.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `false`

retryFetchErrors.title: Retry Fetch Errors
retryFetchErrors.description: Retry on "exception TypeError: fetch failed sending request" errors.
retryFetchErrors.markdownDescription:
Retry on "exception TypeError: fetch failed sending request" errors.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

retryOnRateLimit.title: Auto Retry On Rate Limit
retryOnRateLimit.description: Automatically retry rate-limited requests every 2 minutes while quota dialog is active.
retryOnRateLimit.markdownDescription:
Automatically retry rate-limited requests every 2 minutes while quota dialog is active.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

debugKeystrokeLogging.title: Debug Keystroke Logging
debugKeystrokeLogging.description: Enable debug logging of keystrokes to the console.
debugKeystrokeLogging.markdownDescription:
Enable debug logging of keystrokes to the console.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

sessionRetention.title: Session Retention
sessionRetention.markdownDescription:
Settings for automatic session cleanup.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`

enabled.title: Enable Session Cleanup
enabled.markdownDescription:
Enable automatic session cleanup

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

maxAge.title: Max Session Age
maxAge.description: Maximum age of sessions to keep (e.g., "30d", "7d", "24h", "1w")
maxAge.markdownDescription:
Maximum age of sessions to keep (e.g., "30d", "7d", "24h", "1w")

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`

maxCount.title: Max Session Count
maxCount.description: Alternative: Maximum number of sessions to keep (most recent)
maxCount.markdownDescription:
Alternative: Maximum number of sessions to keep (most recent)

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`

minRetention.title: Min Retention Period
minRetention.description: Minimum retention period (safety limit, defaults to "1d")
minRetention.markdownDescription:
Minimum retention period (safety limit, defaults to "1d")

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `1d`

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat
heartbeat.description: Background heartbeat that can periodically send a continuation prompt while idle.
heartbeat.markdownDescription:
Background heartbeat that can periodically send a continuation prompt while idle.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `{}`

enabled.title: Enable Heartbeat
enabled.description: Enable periodic background continuation prompts while idle.
enabled.markdownDescription:
Enable periodic background continuation prompts while idle.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

intervalSeconds.title: Heartbeat Interval Seconds
intervalSeconds.description: Interval in seconds between heartbeat continuation prompts (minimum 10).
intervalSeconds.markdownDescription:
Interval in seconds between heartbeat continuation prompts (minimum 10).

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `300`

prompt.title: Heartbeat Prompt
prompt.description: Prompt text sent by heartbeat when it fires (for example: "continue").
prompt.markdownDescription:
Prompt text sent by heartbeat when it fires (for example: "continue").

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `continue`

output.title: Output
output.markdownDescription:
Settings for the CLI output.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `{}`

format.title: Output Format
format.description: The format of the CLI output. Can be `text` or `json`.
format.markdownDescription:
The format of the CLI output. Can be `text` or `json`.

- Category: `General`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `text`

ui.title: UI
ui.markdownDescription:
User interface settings.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `{}`

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: The color theme for the UI. See the CLI themes guide for available options.
theme.markdownDescription:
The color theme for the UI. See the CLI themes guide for available options.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`

customThemes.title: Custom Themes
customThemes.markdownDescription:
Custom theme definitions.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `{}`

hideWindowTitle.title: Hide Window Title
hideWindowTitle.markdownDescription:
Hide the window title bar

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `false`

showStatusInTitle.title: Show Thoughts in Title
showStatusInTitle.description: Show Phill CLI model thoughts in the terminal window title during the working phase
showStatusInTitle.markdownDescription:
Show Phill CLI model thoughts in the terminal window title during the working phase

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

dynamicWindowTitle.title: Dynamic Window Title
dynamicWindowTitle.description: Update the terminal window title with current status icons (Ready: ◇, Action Required: ✋, Working: ✦)
dynamicWindowTitle.markdownDescription:
Update the terminal window title with current status icons (Ready: ◇, Action Required: ✋, Working: ✦)

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

showHomeDirectoryWarning.title: Show Home Directory Warning
showHomeDirectoryWarning.description: Show a warning when running Phill CLI in the home directory.
showHomeDirectoryWarning.markdownDescription:
Show a warning when running Phill CLI in the home directory.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `true`

hideTips.title: Hide Tips
hideTips.description: Hide helpful tips in the UI
hideTips.markdownDescription:
Hide helpful tips in the UI

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

hideBanner.title: Hide Banner
hideBanner.markdownDescription:
Hide the application banner

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

hideContextSummary.title: Hide Context Summary
hideContextSummary.description: Hide the context summary (PHILL.md, MCP servers) above the input.
hideContextSummary.markdownDescription:
Hide the context summary (PHILL.md, MCP servers) above the input.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

footer.title: Footer
footer.markdownDescription:
Settings for the footer.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `{}`

hideCWD.title: Hide CWD
hideCWD.description: Hide the current working directory path in the footer.
hideCWD.markdownDescription:
Hide the current working directory path in the footer.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

hideSandboxStatus.title: Hide Sandbox Status
hideSandboxStatus.description: Hide the sandbox status indicator in the footer.
hideSandboxStatus.markdownDescription:
Hide the sandbox status indicator in the footer.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

hideModelInfo.title: Hide Model Info
hideModelInfo.description: Hide the model name and context usage in the footer.
hideModelInfo.markdownDescription:
Hide the model name and context usage in the footer.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

hideContextPercentage.title: Hide Context Window Percentage
hideContextPercentage.description: Hides the context window remaining percentage.
hideContextPercentage.markdownDescription:
Hides the context window remaining percentage.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

hideFooter.title: Hide Footer
hideFooter.description: Hide the footer from the UI
hideFooter.markdownDescription:
Hide the footer from the UI

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

showMemoryUsage.title: Show Memory Usage
showMemoryUsage.description: Display memory usage information in the UI
showMemoryUsage.markdownDescription:
Display memory usage information in the UI

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

showLineNumbers.title: Show Line Numbers
showLineNumbers.description: Show line numbers in the chat.
showLineNumbers.markdownDescription:
Show line numbers in the chat.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

showCitations.title: Show Citations
showCitations.description: Show citations for generated text in the chat.
showCitations.markdownDescription:
Show citations for generated text in the chat.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

showModelInfoInChat.title: Show Model Info In Chat
showModelInfoInChat.description: Show the model name in the chat for each model turn.
showModelInfoInChat.markdownDescription:
Show the model name in the chat for each model turn.

- Requires restart: `no`

cognitiveEngine.title: Meta-Cognition Engine
cognitiveEngine.description: Settings for the background meta-cognition engine (Cognitive Line).
cognitiveEngine.markdownDescription:
Settings for the background meta-cognition engine (Cognitive Line).

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `{}`

enabled.title: Enable Cognitive Engine
enabled.description: Enable the background meta-cognition engine and UI overlay.
enabled.markdownDescription:
Enable the background meta-cognition engine and UI overlay.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `true`

idleThresholdSeconds.title: Idle Threshold (seconds)
idleThresholdSeconds.description: Time in seconds before the engine enters "Dreaming" mode.
idleThresholdSeconds.markdownDescription:
Time in seconds before the engine enters "Dreaming" mode.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `15`

useAlternateBuffer.title: Use Alternate Screen Buffer
useAlternateBuffer.description: Use an alternate screen buffer for the UI, preserving shell history.
useAlternateBuffer.markdownDescription:
Use an alternate screen buffer for the UI, preserving shell history.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `false`

useBackgroundColor.title: Use Background Color
useBackgroundColor.description: Whether to use background colors in the UI.
useBackgroundColor.markdownDescription:
Whether to use background colors in the UI.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

incrementalRendering.title: Incremental Rendering
incrementalRendering.description: Enable incremental rendering for the UI. This option will reduce flickering but may cause rendering artifacts. Only supported when useAlternateBuffer is enabled.
incrementalRendering.markdownDescription:
Enable incremental rendering for the UI. This option will reduce flickering but may cause rendering artifacts. Only supported when useAlternateBuffer is enabled.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `true`

showSpinner.title: Show Spinner
showSpinner.markdownDescription:
Show the spinner during operations.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

customWittyPhrases.title: Custom Witty Phrases
customWittyPhrases.description: Custom witty phrases to display during loading. When provided, the CLI cycles through these instead of the defaults.
customWittyPhrases.markdownDescription:
Custom witty phrases to display during loading. When provided, the CLI cycles through these instead of the defaults.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `[]`

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.markdownDescription:
Accessibility settings.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `{}`

enableLoadingPhrases.title: Enable Loading Phrases
enableLoadingPhrases.markdownDescription:
Enable loading phrases during operations.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `true`

screenReader.title: Screen Reader Mode
screenReader.description: Render output in plain-text to be more screen reader accessible
screenReader.markdownDescription:
Render output in plain-text to be more screen reader accessible

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `yes`
- Default: `false`

voice.title: Voice
voice.markdownDescription:
Voice and TTS settings.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `{}`

enabled.title: Enable Voice
enabled.description: Whether voice input mode is enabled by default.
enabled.markdownDescription:
Whether voice input mode is enabled by default.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

ttsEnabled.title: Enable TTS
ttsEnabled.description: Whether text-to-speech is enabled by default.
ttsEnabled.markdownDescription:
Whether text-to-speech is enabled by default.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

inputDevice.title: Input Device
inputDevice.description: The microphone to use for voice input.
inputDevice.markdownDescription:
The microphone to use for voice input.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `default`

outputDevice.title: Output Device
outputDevice.description: The speaker/output device to use for voice playback.
outputDevice.markdownDescription:
The speaker/output device to use for voice playback.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `default`

captureOutputLoopback.title: Capture Output Loopback
captureOutputLoopback.description: Capture speaker output back into voice input path for full duplex conversational audio setups.
captureOutputLoopback.markdownDescription:
Capture speaker output back into voice input path for full duplex conversational audio setups.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `false`

noiseSuppression.title: Noise Suppression
noiseSuppression.description: Enable real-time background noise suppression for microphone capture.
noiseSuppression.markdownDescription:
Enable real-time background noise suppression for microphone capture.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

noiseSuppressionLevel.title: Noise Suppression Level
noiseSuppressionLevel.description: Strength of real-time noise suppression filtering.
noiseSuppressionLevel.markdownDescription:
Strength of real-time noise suppression filtering.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `standard`

autoGainControl.title: Auto Gain Control
autoGainControl.description: Enable automatic gain leveling so quieter voices remain intelligible.
autoGainControl.markdownDescription:
Enable automatic gain leveling so quieter voices remain intelligible.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

highpassFilter.title: High-pass Filter
highpassFilter.description: Reduce low-frequency rumble and HVAC hum from microphone capture.
highpassFilter.markdownDescription:
Reduce low-frequency rumble and HVAC hum from microphone capture.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

voiceIsolationMode.title: Voice Isolation Mode
voiceIsolationMode.description: Speech-focused cleanup profile. Aggressive removes more background noise but can color voice tone.
voiceIsolationMode.markdownDescription:
Speech-focused cleanup profile. Aggressive removes more background noise but can color voice tone.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `standard`

waiterEnabled.title: Voice Waiter Tool
waiterEnabled.description: Enable persistent voice waiter tool so model can wait/listen/respond naturally in voice mode.
waiterEnabled.markdownDescription:
Enable persistent voice waiter tool so model can wait/listen/respond naturally in voice mode.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

realtimeConversation.title: Realtime Conversation
realtimeConversation.description: Keep a continuous listen/respond loop while voice mode is active.
realtimeConversation.markdownDescription:
Keep a continuous listen/respond loop while voice mode is active.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `true`

minUserSilenceMs.title: Min User Silence (ms)
minUserSilenceMs.description: Minimum silence window before finalizing speech for submission.
minUserSilenceMs.markdownDescription:
Minimum silence window before finalizing speech for submission.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `450`

responseDelayMs.title: Response Delay (ms)
responseDelayMs.description: Small delay before sending finalized transcript to model.
responseDelayMs.markdownDescription:
Small delay before sending finalized transcript to model.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `120`

preferredGender.title: Voice Persona
preferredGender.description: Preferred TTS persona. Auto uses agent identity values first.
preferredGender.markdownDescription:
Preferred TTS persona. Auto uses agent identity values first.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `auto`

preferredStyle.title: Voice Style
preferredStyle.description: Optional TTS speaking style (e.g. calm, cheerful, empathetic).
preferredStyle.markdownDescription:
Optional TTS speaking style (e.g. calm, cheerful, empathetic).

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: ``

ttsProvider.title: TTS Provider
ttsProvider.description: Select TTS backend. Pocket is local fallback-friendly. If setup was skipped, run /voice setup anytime.
ttsProvider.markdownDescription:
Select TTS backend. Pocket is local fallback-friendly. If setup was skipped, run /voice setup anytime.

- Category: `UI`
- Requires restart: `no`
- Default: `auto`

preferAuthTtsProvider.title: Prefer Auth Provider
preferAuthTtsProvider.description: If enabled, Gemini/OpenAI auth can be prioritized over legacy Pocket selection while still keeping Pocket fallback.
preferAuthTtsProvider.markdownDescription:
If enabled, Gemini/OpenAI auth can be prioritized over legacy Pocket selection while still keeping Pocket fallback.

- Requires restart: `no`

geminiApiKey.title: Gemini TTS API Key

geminiApiKey.markdownDescription:
Optional voice-only Gemini API key override for TTS. If empty, existing auth/global Gemini keys are used.

- Requires restart: `no`

geminiVoiceName.description: Optional Gemini TTS voice override (e.g. Kore, Puck, Charon).

approvalMode.markdownDescription:

MCPServerConfig.description: Definition of a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configuration.

args.description: Command-line arguments for the stdio transport command.

env.description: Environment variables to set for the server process.

cwd.description: Working directory for the server process.

url.description: URL for SSE or HTTP transport. Use with "type" field to specify transport type.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers sent to the server.

type.description: Transport type. Use "stdio" for local command, "sse" for Server-Sent Events, or "http" for Streamable HTTP.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for MCP requests.

trust.description: Marks the server as trusted. Trusted servers may gain additional capabilities.

includeTools.description: Subset of tools that should be enabled for this server. When omitted all tools are enabled.

excludeTools.description: Tools that should be disabled for this server even if exposed.

extension.description: Metadata describing the Phill CLI extension that owns this MCP server.

oauth.description: OAuth configuration for authenticating with the server.

authProviderType.description: Authentication provider used for acquiring credentials (for example `dynamic_discovery`).

logPrompts.description: Whether prompts are logged in telemetry payloads.

outfile.description: File path for writing telemetry output.

useCollector.description: Whether to forward telemetry to an OTLP collector.

useCliAuth.description: Whether to use CLI authentication for telemetry (only for in-process exporters).

BugCommandSettings.description: Configuration for the bug report helper command.

urlTemplate.description: Template used to open a bug report URL. Variables in the template are populated at runtime.

SummarizeToolOutputSettings.description: Controls summarization behavior for individual tools. All properties are optional.

tokenBudget.description: Maximum number of tokens used when summarizing tool output.

AgentOverride.description: Override settings for a specific agent.

maxTimeMinutes.description: The maximum execution time for the agent in minutes.

maxTurns.description: The maximum number of conversational turns.

CustomTheme.description: Custom theme definition used for styling Phill CLI output. Colors are provided as hex strings or named ANSI colors.

StringOrStringArray.description: Accepts either a single string or an array of strings.

BooleanOrString.description: Accepts either a boolean flag or a string command name.

HookDefinitionArray.description: Array of hook definition objects for a specific event.

items.description: Hook definition specifying matcher pattern and hook configurations.

matcher.description: Pattern to match against the event context (tool name, notification type, etc.). Supports exact match, regex (/pattern/), and wildcards (*).

hooks.description: Hooks to execute when the matcher matches.

command.description: Shell command to execute. Receives JSON input via stdin and returns JSON output via stdout.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for hook execution.
